case_title: DICKSON, EMMA JEAN VS DICKSON, DEBORAH REDELL

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS CONTINUED FROM DEC-26-2003 TO JUN-25-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICKSON, EMMA JEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DICKSON, DEBORAH REDELL $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $302.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

IF NO APPEARANCE ON 6/25/04 AT 1:30PM, CASE IS CONTINUED FURTHER FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT TO BE PAID AT $25.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 1/15/04 & ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DICKSON, DEBORAH REDELL HEARING SET FOR DEC-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF DEC-22-2004, DENIED
